subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, and He Who hath appeared in truth - through Him hath surged the ocean of utterance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی ظهر بالحق به ماج بحر البیان
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @laws of marriage and dowry, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @unity; oneness of humanity, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
